title: Josh Gondrez
role_summary: Denver artist; co-owner of Leisure Gallery; co-directed the Killd By "No Energy Vamp" music video (Spring 2015).
body: Denver-based artist; co-owner of Leisure Gallery at 555 Santa Fe Drive. Co-directed and shot the "No Energy Vamp" music video for Killd By with Janice Schindler, filmed at Leisure Gallery in Spring 2015.
